reviews.review_msg: I loveeeeee Carleigh, I've taken her twice now and I'd take her again if I weren't graduating! Honestly one of the best profs I've ever had in uni and I genuinely enjoyed all of her classes. The sweetest, most understanding person and always gives great feedback on work. Take her class if you ever have the chance!!

I love Carleigh. I'm in 4th year and am honestly just tired of uni and ready to graduate, but I actually looked forward to her classes (and they were NIGHT classes!) I think she gave great advice in creative writing and really cares about her students. Considering how easy this course is, I learned a lot because she made me want to learn :)
